prompt: Wir haben gerade das architecture assessment für unseren neuen IoT-Sensor-Datenverarbeitungs-Service abgeschlossen. Die architecture.md liegt vor. Bitte hilf mir die passende Architektur auszuwählen.

assertions.text: Recommends Event-Driven or Space-Based as the top candidate (both score 15/15 on scalability+elasticity+fault-tolerance)
Shows a ranked table with fit scores for all 8 architecture styles against the 3 driving characteristics
Includes tradeoff analysis for at least 2 top candidates (strengths, weaknesses, cost)
Mentions cost difference between candidates (Event-Driven $$$ vs Space-Based $$$$)
Updates architecture.md with Selected Architecture Style section including rationale, tradeoffs accepted, and evolution path
Does NOT recommend Layered, Modular Monolith, or Microkernel (all score 3/15 for these characteristics)
